subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-05-05 in Abu Sinan
subcodes.first_line: I wish for you consecrated services to the Cause of God. I wish for you to manifest radiant attributes under all conditions and to raise the Word of God.
subcodes.first_line_orig: من شما را بجهت خدمت امرالله میخواهم میخواهم شما در جمیع آنچه میبینید و تجربه کرده اید
subcodes.subjects: @war and peace, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
